question: Which students take 2 courses? List student id and details.
sql: SELECT s.student_id, s.student_details FROM Students s JOIN Classes c ON s.student_id = c.student_id GROUP BY s.student_id HAVING COUNT(c.class_id) = 2;

back_translation.intent: 查找属于恰好两个班级的学生信息

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求列出恰好选修2门课程的学生ID和详细信息，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、表、列、分组和聚合均符合该要求。
